name: Reflex Grid
description: How fast are YOUR reflexes? Put them to the ultimate test in Reflex Grid — the lightning-fast tile-tapping game that will push your reaction time to the absolute limit! **Tap glowing tiles** before they vanish into the darkness. Miss one and lose a life. Chain hits together to build massive combos and skyrocket your score!
